author: hlieberman
text:
Currently, the client produces three binaries - /usr/bin/letsencrypt, /usr/bin/letsencrypt-renewer, and /usr/bin/jws. However, the sphinx build of documentation only includes a single manpage - letsencrypt.1.

Please create manpages for the other installed binaries, if they are needed. If they're not needed, let me know, and I will prune them from the Debian packaging.

author: kuba
text: Add basic manpages for all binaries (fixes [certbot#700](https://github.com/certbot/certbot/issues/700)).
